title: WIP: Add sigstore sign option to push command
body:
### TODO:
- [ ] Establish correct UX for Sigstore `--sign` option to differentiate between `--sign-by`.
- [ ] Update manpages once proper UX is defined.

ref https://github.com/containers/common/pull/748
ref https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1364

<!--

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:

If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.

A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.

> @font Any update on this PR?

@rhatdan The large majority of the work is happening in c/image so not much needs to happen here at this point. This PR was just to show an e2e flow. This could almost be closed until the work in c/image is complete.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
@font Where do we stand on this now?
Closing this for now as it's dependent on c/image.
